blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Blocked by missing funded/connected wallet signer and no successful trade creation path from attempted flow.
Blocked by missing signer prerequisites and no reachable local mutation path linked to this frontend run.
Blocked by missing prerequisite trade activity (5+ trades) in isolated environment.
Blocked by unavailable automatable connected wallet in this flow boundary.
Blocked due to lack of observable state-driving events during reconnect test (no live updates to validate recovery correctness).
Blocked by wallet/signing prerequisite; insufficient-balance and retry-success transaction outcomes were unreachable.
Blocked by missing external state-driving endpoint/signer path inside assigned boundary.
No automatable connected wallet/signing context available in this browser boundary (credentials/extension prerequisite).
Depth-dependent quote behavior could not be fully validated in this run because displayed quote stayed at 0.00 for multiple inputs.
Wallet connection prerequisite not satisfied, so transaction submission could not be executed.
Local orderbook depth was empty (No orders yet), so row-level bid/ask coloration and cumulative-depth rendering could not be fully validated.
Blocked by missing runtime depth data; required green/red stepped depth areas cannot be validated in empty-state mode.
Blocked by missing runtime trade data; ticker row color/time and new-trade animation cannot be validated without entries.
Could not place order without connected wallet/signing flow.
Open-order prerequisite unavailable because wallet-dependent placement flow could not run.
Realtime behavior could not be fully validated because no executable path existed to generate a new order event in this session.
Disconnect could not be tested because connected-wallet state was never reached.
Failed-transaction assertion is blocked until a connected wallet can submit signed transactions from the UI.

appliedUpdates.description: Added frontend validation findings covering wallet-signing prerequisites, empty depth/trade-data blockers, and missing REST mutation route for cross-flow assertions.
